name: registry-mode skips a source whose last-fetch marker is inside the fetch_frequency window (freshness-skip)
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-o09-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && cat > $OUT/src.md <<'MD'
# Framework

## Rule x
prose.
MD
cat > $OUT/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml <<YAML
sources:
- id: fresh-src
  name: F
  jurisdiction: us-government
  url: $OUT/src.md
  authoritative_publisher: Pub
  fetch_frequency: weekly
YAML
cd $OUT && mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && echo '2026-07-10T00:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/fresh-src.txt && CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT" bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --registry $OUT/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml --now 2026-07-11T00:00:00Z 2>e.err; grep -q 'SKIP sid=fresh-src' e.err && grep -q 'total=1 processed=0 skipped=1' e.err && echo registry-mode-freshness-skip 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
